run_name: Coronium V3 PRO — Final V3 Checkpoint

metrics.metric_note: z_space = error in normalized Z-score space as computed during the training loop. physical = error on the real proxy scale [% pixels |B|>200G], comparing raw targets with predictions denormalized as (pred*0.3462)+1.7658. Physical-space metrics were used for external reporting in this run.

notes: Final run for the first V3 PRO checkpoint. V3ResidualBlock architecture with ECA attention. Dataset expanded to 1,763 samples, adding 605 samples over V2 PRO. WeightedHuberLoss reduced quiet-Sun bias. Dropout was reduced to 0.2 after the dataset expansion. Optimizer changed from Adam to AdamW with weight_decay=1e-5. Early stopping triggered at epoch 43. Weights were saved as coronium_v3_final.pth and coronium_v3_pro.pth; both files are identical.
